readme.txt (CAR tool tip)

November/December 2003
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

NICAR is soliciting recommendations from Uplink readers for their favorite CAR (Computer-Assisted Reporting) tools to feature.

Have a favorite CAR tool that Uplink readers should know about? Drop us a note at uplink@nicar.org and tell us about it.
